mnemonics: Father Understands Nice Dinner And Refreshments Everyday (Fundamentals Used Need Driving And Resources Everyday)
Mother Eats Nachos Daily After School Everyday (Memory Helps You Learn Daily After School Everyday)
keyPoints: Process Management: Creation, Execution, Monitoring and Termination of processes.
Memory Management: Allocation, Deallocation and Protection of Memory for Processes.
File Management: Creation, Deletion, Reading, Writing and Truncating of files.
Input/Output Management: Handling of Input/Output operations such as Keyboard, Mouse, Printer, Disk etc.
Interrupt Handling: Handling of interrupts generated by hardware devices.
Deadlock Prevention and Recovery: Prevention and recovery of Deadlocks in a System.
Resource Allocation and Deallocation: Allocation and Deallocation of System Resources such as CPU, Memory etc.
Security: Access Control, Authentication and Authorization of users and processes.
Performance Monitoring and Management: Monitoring and Management of System Performance.
